sop: After completing my BDS, I realized that my interests lie more on the management side than in clinical practice. During my internship rotations, I was drawn to how hospitals are run — the administrative leadership challenges, quality improvement initiatives, and the coordination involved in keeping a large health system functioning smoothly. I want to be part of shaping how healthcare organizations operate, specifically in areas like accreditation and risk management. I see myself leading operations at a multi-specialty hospital someday.
